notes: Brazil are without pre-tournament absentees Rodrygo (torn ACL/meniscus), Estêvão (hamstring), Éder Militão, and Wesley, while Raphinha remains a doubt with a hamstring issue and Neymar is limited to a substitute role after his calf injury. Japan are missing key attackers Kaoru Mitoma (hamstring) and Takumi Minamino (ACL), lost captain Wataru Endo to a foot injury just before the tournament, and have a fitness concern over Takefusa Kubo (knee) who is not yet training fully ahead of the Round of…
home_scorers: Vinícius Júnior (leading striker, scored in every group game, in-form)
Matheus Cunha (clinical finisher, key goal vs Scotland, likely starter)
Lucas Paquetá (attacking midfielder, set-piece threat, creative hub)
away_scorers: Ayase Ueda (main striker, scored twice in group stage, squad top scorer)
Ritsu Doan (wide attacker, danger man, 11 international goals)
Daichi Kamada (midfield goal threat, two group-stage goals, penalty taker)
